content.text:
<user_query>
delete all issues on this project board https://github.com/orgs/trilogy-group/projects/699/  and close them (not jsut remove from the borad)
</user_query>

I'll inspect the GitHub project board and list its issues so we can close them properly, not just remove them from the board.

[REDACTED]

input.command: gh auth status 2>&1 && gh project view 699 --owner trilogy-group --format json 2>&1
input.description: Check gh auth and project details
List all items on project 699 via GraphQL

content.text:
Found 7 open issues (#66–#72) in `trilogy-group/test-ab`. Closing them now (not just removing from the board).

[REDACTED]

input.command:
for n in 66 67 68 69 70 71 72; do
  gh issue close "trilogy-group/test-ab#$n" --comment "Closing as part of project board cleanup (project 699)." 2>&1
done
input.description: Close all 7 issues on the project board

input.command:
for n in 66 67 68 69 70 71 72; do
  gh issue close "$n" -R trilogy-group/test-ab 2>&1
done

content.text:
All issues are closed. Removing them from the project board to finish cleanup.

[REDACTED]

input.description: Remove all items from project board

input.command: gh project view 699 --owner trilogy-group --format json 2>&1 && echo "---" && for n in 66 67 68 69 70 71 72; do gh issue view "$n" -R trilogy-group/test-ab --json number,state,title -q '"\(.number) \(.state) \(.title)"' 2>&1; done
input.description: Verify board empty and issues closed

content.text:
Done. On project board [test-rebase (#699)](https://github.com/orgs/trilogy-group/projects/699), all **7 issues** in `trilogy-group/test-ab` were **closed** and **removed from the board**:

| Issue | Title | Status |
|-------|-------|--------|
| #66 | Admin cross-key visibility, ownership transfer, and auto-revoke on deactivation | CLOSED |
| #67 | Attendance and leave endpoints with automated cost loop into CostLedger | CLOSED |
| #68 | Webhook subscriptions, signed delivery, and full event taxonomy emission | CLOSED |
| #69 | Milestone overdue derivation surfaced on reads and in downstream artifacts | CLOSED |
| #70 | Investor report endpoint with structured bundle and INBACKLOG guard | CLOSED |
| #71 | Trilovation evaluation engine with daily UTC cache and MCP tools | CLOSED |
| #72 | trilovation.evaluation_completed webhook event | CLOSED |

The project board now has **0 items**.

**Note:** GitHub does not allow permanently deleting issues via the API — closing is the standard way to retire them. They remain in the repo history as closed issues. If you need them fully purged, that requires org admin action through GitHub support or the repo settings (if enabled).

[REDACTED]
